problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrospun. Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
